sentences.english: What is one skill that you think everyone should learn?
sentences.korean: 모든 사람이 배워야 한다고 생각하는 기술 한 가지는 무엇입니까?

sentences.english: I believe everyone should learn basic cooking skills.
sentences.korean: 모든 사람이 기본적인 요리 기술을 배워야 한다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: First knowing how to cook saves a tremendous amount of money over a lifetime.
sentences.korean: 첫째 요리할 줄 알면 평생에 걸쳐 엄청난 돈을 절약해요.

sentences.english: People who rely entirely on restaurants and delivery spend three to four times more on food than those who cook at home.
sentences.korean: 전적으로 식당과 배달에 의존하는 사람은 집에서 요리하는 사람보다 식비를 3~4배 더 써요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: Second cooking gives you control over your nutrition which directly impacts your long-term health.
sentences.korean: 둘째 요리는 영양을 조절할 수 있게 해주고 이는 장기 건강에 직접 영향을 미쳐요.

sentences.english: It's a practical life skill that pays dividends every single day.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
